description_long: This object is a round watermelon with a smooth, glossy rind featuring alternating dark green and light green stripes that curve around its surface. The stripes are irregular and organic, giving the watermelon a natural, fresh appearance. At the top, a short, thick green stem is attached, adding to its realism. The rind appears unblemished, with no visible cuts, cracks, or major imperfections. The surface reflects light, indicating a waxy, slightly polished finish typical of fresh watermelons. No interior or seeds are visible, and the object is entirely intact.
description: A round watermelon with glossy, striped green rind and a short green stem, featuring alternating dark and light green curved stripes.
description_view_0: This view shows the watermelon from above, highlighting the attached green stem and the vertical dark green stripes running down the sides.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the curved, irregular striping pattern and the glossy surface, with the stem visible at an angle.
description_view_2: This view presents the bottom of the watermelon, showing the convergence of the stripes and a smooth, uninterrupted rind.
description_view_3: This angled view displays the side and part of the top, with the striping pattern wrapping around the surface and the stem slightly off-center.
attribute_pattern: Alternating, irregular dark and light green stripes curving around the surface in a natural, organic arrangement.
attribute_rind_markings: Distinct, vertical dark green stripes of varying width and curvature on a light green background; no visible spots or blemishes.
